note: LinkedIn's UI limits can change over time; verify current limits if precision matters for a live campaign. Values below are commonly cited working limits as of this skill's last update.

practical_guidance.connection_request_note: Aim for 150-250 characters even though the cap is 300 — shorter reads as more natural and less like a template.
practical_guidance.dm_messages: Even though the technical limit is much higher, keep individual DMs under ~500 characters (roughly 80-100 words) to match platform norms; long DMs read as emails pasted into the wrong app.
